basicInfo.title: Falling for my boyfriend's Navy brother
basicInfo.genre: Contemporary Romance / New Adult / Military Romance
basicInfo.theme: 从安全但平淡的关系到危险而真实的爱情，芭蕾舞者与海军特种兵的禁忌之恋

examples: Chapter 1: Will Penny get the solo?
Chapter 7: The intense first meeting with Asher
Chapter 8: Tyler abandons Penny - what will happen?
The forbidden attraction building between Penny and Asher

emotionalInvestment.reason: 读者会对Penny产生强烈共鸣，感受她在toxic relationship中的挣扎，以及与Asher之间危险的化学反应

paceControl.reason: 节奏张弛有度，芭蕾训练场景与情感戏交替，第7章的初遇是完美的高潮

rewardFrequency.reason: 每章都有情感奖励点，从芭蕾成就到与Asher的紧张互动

examples: Chapter 7 ending: Asher watching Penny with unreadable eyes
Chapter 8 ending: Tyler leaves, Penny walks home alone in the cold, Asher's gaze following her
The constant tension between Penny and Asher

warnings: Slow burn romance - may frustrate readers wanting instant gratification
Tyler is clearly a toxic boyfriend - some readers may get frustrated with Penny's loyalty
Forbidden romance (brother's girlfriend) may be controversial

protagonist.name: Penelope 'Penny' Vale
protagonist.arc: 从依赖Tyler的validation → 意识到relationship的问题 → 被Asher吸引 → 开始质疑自己的选择

supporting.name: Asher Hayes
supporting.description: 6'3", dark wavy hair past jawline, massive build, dark eyes, wears black Henley

supporting.name: Tyler Hayes
supporting.description: 6'0", lean athletic build, brown messy hair, warm smile

supporting.name: Madame Loretto
supporting.relationship: Pushes Penny hard but recognizes her talent

supporting.name: Mila
supporting.relationship: Penny's only real friend, sees through Tyler

supporting.name: Zoe
supporting.relationship: Tyler helped her with chemistry, now hangs with Rebecca

supporting.name: Mr. & Mrs. Hayes
supporting.relationship: Treat Penny better than her own parents

relationships.description: First love, but he's forgetful, dismissive, and emotionally unavailable
Intense chemistry, unspoken tension, dangerous pull
Cold exterior but can't stop watching her, sees through Tyler
Takes her for granted, prioritizes others over her
Only person who truly supports Penny

keyEvents: Penny struggles in ballet class, redeems herself
Tyler forgets to pick her up (again)
Tyler defends Zoe instead of Penny
Penny meets Jonathan, has a moment of lightness
Tyler apologizes but doesn't really understand
Penny goes to Hayes family dinner
Warm family atmosphere contrasts with Penny's own family
Asher is cold and hostile to Penny
Dinner is tense, Asher scoffs at ballet
Mrs. Hayes apologizes for Asher's behavior
Penny and Asher have charged moment in hallway
Tyler abandons Penny to go to a party
Penny walks home alone, Asher watches

mainConflicts: Bullying from Rebecca and her clique
Pressure to succeed in ballet (Spring Gala)
Penny's people-pleasing tendencies vs. her own needs
plot.climax: Chapter 7-8 - Asher's arrival and the immediate, undeniable chemistry despite his coldness

goldenQuotes: I don't need the praise. I don't need the applause. I just need the dance.
You don't have to carry that. I'm here, okay?
Real friends don't leave your side so fast.
It will only be as awkward as you make it.
He's like that with most people. Cold. Short. He's been that way for a while now.
It's not personal. His job's not easy.
Be patient with him. It's not you. It's just... life.

highlights.scene: Penny's redemption dance after Madame's criticism
Rebecca's cruel bullying in the hallway
Tyler defending Zoe instead of Penny
Jonathan's funny doodles lighten Penny's mood
Asher's first appearance - the doorway moment
Penny bumps into Asher in the hallway
Tyler abandons Penny, Asher tells her
Penny walks home alone, Asher watches

suitableFor: Readers who love alpha male heroes
Readers who love brother's best friend trope (variation)

coreMarkets.strategy: Forbidden romance + Military hero + Toxic boyfriend angle
Slow burn + Alpha male + Ballet dancer angle
禁忌之恋 + 军人英雄 + 芭蕾舞者

creativeDirections.name: Forbidden Romance Angle (禁忌之恋角度)
creativeDirections.coreMessage: When your boyfriend's brother is everything you didn't know you needed
keyScenes: Chapter 7: Asher's first appearance in the doorway
Chapter 7: The tense dinner with undercurrents
quotes: He's staring at me. Not smiling. Not curious. Not welcoming.
It's like passing a statue—hard, unmoving, cold.
Every time I look up—Asher's already watching.

creativeDirections.name: Toxic Boyfriend vs. Alpha Male Angle (渣男vs真男人角度)
creativeDirections.coreMessage: She deserves better than a boy who forgets her. She deserves a man who can't stop watching her.
keyScenes: Chapter 1: Tyler forgets to pick Penny up
Chapter 2: Tyler defends Zoe instead of Penny
Chapter 8: Tyler abandons Penny for a party
quotes: That's, what, the fourth time? Fifth.
He got a text. Something about a party. Said he'd be back later.

creativeDirections.name: Military Romance Angle (军人浪漫角度)
creativeDirections.targetAudience: Military romance fans, alpha male lovers
creativeDirections.coreMessage: Navy SEAL. Cold. Damaged. Dangerous. And he can't take his eyes off her.
keyScenes: Chapter 8: Mrs. Hayes explains his trauma
quotes: Three years of combat boots and blood and whatever horrors Navy SEALs deal with
His job's not easy. Not the kind you leave at the door when you come home.
He's probably seen things the rest of us can't even imagine.

creativeDirections.name: Ballet Dancer Angle (芭蕾舞者角度)
creativeDirections.coreMessage: She dances like her life depends on it. Because it does.
keyScenes: Chapter 6: Practice stress with Gala moved up
quotes: I don't need the praise. I don't need the applause. I just need the dance.
You make the floor look like it belongs to you.

creativeDirections.name: Slow Burn Tension Angle (慢热张力角度)
creativeDirections.targetAudience: Slow burn romance fans, tension lovers
creativeDirections.coreMessage: The best romances are the ones that burn slow. And this one is on fire.
keyScenes: Chapter 7: Every glance across the dinner table
Chapter 8: The silent stare before Penny leaves
quotes: Every once in a while, without meaning to, I look up. And every time I do—Asher's already watching.
The silence stretches out between us, thick and taut.
I feel it again. The weight of his gaze.
